note: Legal freelance pipeline test scrape: contract attorneys, fractional counsel, fund formation, and interim positions from job boards. All leads scored 55+. Sources: Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter, Indeed, Virtual Vocations. Boolean clusters: fractional/interim GC, contract attorney + corporate/contracts, fund formation counsel, commercial contracts + freelance, securities counsel, outside counsel, legal consultants.

leads.name: aVenture
intentDetails: +15 remote/hybrid-flex (work from anywhere, 4hrs USD PST overlap)
signals: Private fund registration & regulatory compliance focus
leads.notes: aVenture is a San Francisco fintech platform providing access to VC funds. Seeking fund attorney with 7+ years in fund formation & venture capital. Role includes: PPM drafting, operating agreements, registration statements. Part-time option makes this a high-intent lead.

leads.name: Everything But The House (EBTH)
signals: Ohio location preference but part-time may allow remote
leads.notes: Everything But The House is a leading online marketplace for estate sales & auctions (Cincinnati-based). Seeking Fractional GC for 10-20 hrs/week. Requires prior GC or fractional GC experience. Deep expertise needed in auction/marketplace models, IP & platform protection. Strong signal: explicit fractional model, stated comp, recent posting.

leads.name: Latitude Legal
fitDetails: +10 commercial contracts (labor & employment shown, but multi-practice)
+10 seniority counsel level (Big Law & in-house counsel pool)
intentDetails: +15 remote/hybrid-flex (fully remote, part-time (5-10 hrs/week or more))
+10 posted within 72 hrs (active Latitude Legal job board)
leads.compensationText: $150,000 - $200,000+ annualized (contract rates shown for similar roles)
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Part-Time Contract (5-10 hrs/week, flexible to more)
signals: Established legal staffing firm with flexible contract model
Fully remote, part-time work (5-10 hrs/week expandable)
leads.notes: Latitude Legal is a Chambers-ranked flexible legal staffing firm offering contract roles with former Big Law and in-house counsel. Posting shows Contract Labor & Employment Attorney (fully remote, 5-10 hrs/week, expandable). Fit Score lower due to labor/employment focus (not fund/corporate primary), but high Intent Score due to explicit contract/fractional model and ease of engagement.

leads.name: Virtual Vocations / Fund Formation Attorney (Contract)
fitDetails: +20 fund formation (explicit fund formation attorney role)
intentDetails: +15 contract/interim (Virtual Vocations job board, contract posting)
+10 posted within 72 hrs (active Virtual Vocations listing)
signals: Explicit fund formation attorney contract role
Virtual Vocations is remote-focused job board
leads.notes: Fund Formation Attorney contract role posted on Virtual Vocations. Requires 7+ years in fund formation & venture capital/PE. 100% remote, contract-based. May involve leading fund formation, regulatory compliance, commercial contracts, executive collaboration. High Fit due to explicit fund formation focus; Intent score slightly lower due to less explicit contract/freelance language in posting itself.

leads.name: Upwork / Freelance Contract Law Professionals
fitDetails: +10 seniority counsel level (former in-house & Big Law counsel)
leads.compensationText: Varies by freelancer, typical range $160k-$200k annualized (contract attorney equivalent)
signals: Commercial contracts focus (NDAs, MSAs, employment agreements)
leads.notes: Upwork has 1000+ freelance contract law professionals available for hire. Key workstreams: commercial contracts, corporate law, NDAs, MSAs, employment agreements. Fit Score lower due to general marketplace (not specific fund/corporate fund roles), but high Intent Score due to explicit freelance model. Bulk lead (multiple potential attorneys available on-demand).

leads.name: Glassdoor / Remote Contract Attorney Roles (Apr-May 2026)
fitDetails: +10 seniority counsel level (Senior IP Counsel, Product Counsel roles)
signals: Mix of companies: Liberty Mutual, CBRE, Quill & Arrow Law, etc
Roles include product counsel, IP counsel, commercial counsel
leads.notes: Glassdoor lists 487 remote contracts attorney positions as of Apr-May 2026. While not all are freelance/interim/fractional (many are full-time contract positions), this represents high volume of contract attorney demand. Fit Score moderate (many roles may not be freelance-intent); Intent Score good (all are contract employment, 100% remote). Suggest using Glassdoor filters for 'Contract' employment type and 'Remote' location for targeted prospecting.
